extension.summary: Genesis Skins - Icon Theme Pack for Genesis
extension.description:
Genesis Skins v1.1.0 provides customizable icon themes for the Genesis addon.
NEW in v1.1.0: - Added Plex Server icon (all themes) - Added Emby Server icon (all themes) - Icons match existing theme styles
Included Themes: - Classic: Traditional clean icons - Futuristic: Modern sci-fi style icons - Anime: Japanese animation style icons - Water: Blue aquatic themed icons
Features: - Auto-detects new theme folders - Works with Genesis addon - Easy to add your own themes
To add a new theme: 1. Create a folder in resources/media/ 2. Add PNG icons with the same names as existing placeholders 3. The new theme will appear automatically in settings
Created by zeus768.
extension.disclaimer: This addon provides icon themes only.
extension.news:
v1.1.0 (2026) - Added Plex Server icon for all themes - Added Emby Server icon for all themes
v1.0.0 (2026) - Initial release with 4 themes
